g.text: BLUE-GREEN: keep two identical production environments; switch traffic between them
BEFORE CUTOVER: BLUE is live, GREEN is being prepared
AFTER CUTOVER: GREEN is live, BLUE held in reserve

text.tspan: ROLLBACK: flip the router back to BLUE
u2192 happens in seconds (DNS / LB rule)
u2192 NO redeploy, NO database restore, NO downtime
u2192 zero-downtime deploys + instant safety net
